notes: Dedicated DOT Life crawler uses LinkedIn public guest endpoints for company 9425984 (DOT Life SA). No login required. Guest listing: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs-guest/jobs/api/seeMoreJobPostings/search?f_C=9425984&geoId=92000000&start=0. Guest detail: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs-guest/jobs/api/jobPosting/{jobId}. Canonicalizes to /jobs/view/{jobId}/ URLs.
